title: Kalshi Monitor
text:
Prediction markets like Kalshi claim to be the new way of reporting on world events. I’m a bit skeptical, so let’s test their claim by putting on a data journalist’s hat and pulling data from their public API.








 














 




  




Analyzing S&P Volitility With R, Kalshi and tidyquant





Walking through prediction markets, Monte Carlo simulations and VIX-adjusted volatility to build a daily market probability model






Apr 1, 2026
